item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-025","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant treated the request as an evidence review: it stated it could not inspect the prior session, asked the user to paste the relevant output, and offered minimal criteria for checking whether a snapshot was present. It referenced MPG-AQM-related elements only as verification criteria, not as a reason to run an MPG process on the current conversation. No MPG workflow escalation or methodized judgment loop was applied."}
